title: Implement IC-5: No Module Auto-Enables Itself
intent: Implement the IC-5 invariant check as specified in tools/ci/invariant-checks.md. Static scan verifying that no module manifest in modules/ sets default_enabled: true on any capability descriptor. Replaces the IC-5 stub in CI with a real enforcement gate.
acceptance_criteria: Completed and accepted prior to factory v0.1 migration
